>更新时间：2026.07.11

# 微信支付 - H5支付（普通商户）文档索引

> H5 支付为商户提供在手机浏览器网页（非微信客户端内部浏览器）中使用微信支付收款的能力，用户在浏览器发起支付时会跳转到微信内，支付后可返回浏览器中商户的H5页面。

## 接入指引
- [产品介绍](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012791832.md)
- [常见问题](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012791845.md)
- [开发指引](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012791831.md)
- [开发接入准备](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4015614193.md)
- [错误码](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4020769168.md)

## API 列表
- [H5下单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012791834.md)
- [H5调起支付](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012791835.md)
- [微信支付订单号查询订单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012791837.md)
- [商户订单号查询订单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012791838.md)
- [关闭订单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012791839.md)
- [支付成功回调通知](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012791836.md)
- [退款申请](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012810597.md)
- [查询单笔退款（按商户退款单号）](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012810601.md)
- [发起异常退款](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012810603.md)
- [退款结果回调通知](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012810605.md)
- [申请交易账单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012810606.md)
- [申请资金账单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012810609.md)
- [下载账单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012810615.md)

- [关闭订单 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012791839-java.md)
- [关闭订单 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012791839-go.md)

- [商户订单号查询订单 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012791838-go.md)

- [查询单笔退款（按商户退款单号） - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012810601-go.md)

- [申请交易账单 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012810606-java.md)
- [申请交易账单 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012810606-go.md)

- [申请资金账单 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012810609-java.md)
- [申请资金账单 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/merchant/4012810609-go.md)
